description_long: This is a metal-framed bunk bed with two stacked sleeping platforms, each fitted with a thin, quilted mattress. The frame is constructed from tubular black metal, featuring rounded corners and horizontal support bars for stability. The upper bunk is equipped with a partial safety rail on one side to prevent falls, while the lower bunk is open for easy access. A vertical ladder is integrated into the frame at one end, allowing access to the top bunk. Both bunks have simple, utilitarian headboards and footboards formed by the curved metal tubing. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for urban environments such as hostels, dormitories, or temporary shelters.
description: A black metal bunk bed with two stacked beds, thin mattresses, and a built-in ladder. The design is minimal and functional, with safety rails on the upper bunk.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bunks, the partial safety rail on the upper bunk, and the ladder on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the tubular frame, and the alignment of the mattresses.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of both bunks, the frame structure, and the absence of a ladder or safety rail on this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the frame and mattress alignment from the other end.
